column1: 長い議論の末、やっと合意に達した。
column2: ながいぎろんのすえ、やっとごういにたっした。
column3: After a long discussion, we finally reached an agreement.
column4: た末・の末 (after ~ing, as the final result of, at the end of)
column5: Verb[た] + 末に / Noun + の + 末に
column6: marks the outcome after a long process; the result comes at the conclusion of extended effort, struggle, or deliberation
column8: 末に = outcome after long process; 結果 = direct result of action; 後で = after (neutral timing); あげく = in the end (often negative result after trouble)
